title: Person
description: A person or character within the Star Wars universe

height.description: The height of the person in centimeters

mass.description: The mass of the person in kilograms

hair_color.description: The hair color of this person. Will be 'unknown' if not known or 'n/a' if the person does not have hair

skin_color.description: The skin color of this person

eye_color.description: The eye color of this person. Will be 'unknown' if not known or 'n/a' if the person does not have eyes

birth_year.description: The birth year of the person, using the in-universe standard of BBY or ABY - Before the Battle of Yavin or After the Battle of Yavin

gender.description: The gender of this person. Either 'male', 'female' or 'unknown', 'n/a' if the person does not have a gender

homeworld.description: URL of the planet resource that this person was born on

films.description: URLs of film resources this person has been in

species.description: URLs of species resources that this person belongs to

vehicles.description: URLs of vehicle resources that this person has piloted

starships.description: URLs of starship resources that this person has piloted

created.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this resource was created

edited.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this resource was last edited

url.description: The hypermedia URL of this resource
